---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible bug or regression
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug
A clear, concise description of what went wrong.

## Reproduction
1. Command: `python main.py ...`
2. Config (redact secrets): ...
3. Expected behavior: ...
4. Actual behavior: ...

## Error output
```
<paste stack trace or relevant logs/scraper.log lines>
```

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: `python --version`
- Package version / commit: [e.g. 1.0.0 or git SHA]
- Using proxy: yes / no
- TikTok session cookies set: yes / no

## Additional context
Anything else we should know — rate-limit patterns, hashtag specifics, recent
TikTok site changes, etc.
